articles.title: Incyte (INCY) Could Be 8% Overvalued As Latarcibart Moves Into Phase 3
articles.summary: Incyte (INCY) is back in focus after releasing complete safety and efficacy data from a Phase 1/2 study of latarcibart, its investigational monoclonal antibody for von Willebrand disease, and advancing the program into Phase 3. articles.title: How Investors May Respond To Incyte (INCY) Latarcibart Data In Von Willebrand Disease Prophylaxis
articles.summary: Incyte recently reported full Phase 1/2 multidose data for latarcibart (VGA039), an investigational, once‑monthly subcutaneous monoclonal antibody that targets Protein S and showed substantial reductions in bleeding rates across all von Willebrand disease types, with a favorable safety profile, in 16 treated patients. The therapy’s potential to offer the first self‑administered, once‑monthly prophylactic option for VWD, versus frequent intravenous factor infusions, could materially change...

articles.title: Incyte Says Early Data Points To Promise For Once-Monthly Preventive Treatment For Inherited Blood Disorder
articles.summary: Incyte Corporation (NASDAQ:INCY) on Monday reported complete Phase 1/2 multidose data for latarcibart (VGA039), showing substantial reductions in bleeding episodes and a favorable safety profile in patients with von Willebrand disease (VWD). VWD is the most common inherited bleeding disorder, affecting about 1% of the population.
